title: New `docs` query argument
excerpt: You can now specify the documents you would like to return in a docs query using the object_ids argument. Please note that this is the same ID found in the URL and in the doc column values!

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml: You can now specify the documents you would like to return in a docs query using the object_ids argument. Please note that this is the same ID found in the URL and in the doc column values!
